steps.title: Identify the lower bound from the minimum temperature
steps.content:
Since the lowest recorded temperature was 31°F, any recorded temperature $t$ in this period must be at least 31°F. This gives us the constraint:
$$t \ge 31$$

steps.title: Identify the upper bound from the maximum temperature
steps.content:
Since the highest recorded temperature was 67°F, any recorded temperature $t$ in this period cannot exceed 67°F. This gives us the constraint:
$$t \le 67$$

steps.title: Combine constraints into a compound inequality
steps.content:
For any recorded temperature to satisfy both the minimum and maximum constraints, it must satisfy both inequalities simultaneously:
$$31 \le t \le 67$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
